title: $PROC_LOG_FILE
text: $PROC_LOG_FILE Specify the profiling log file. $PROC_LOG_FILE = LogFileName Defaults Assignment file: client assignment files Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description $PROC_LOG_FILE determines the name of the log file that is used for ProcScript profiling and tracing. If you do not specify a name for your log file, the profiling information is written to the Message Frame or the message log file. Related Links $PROC_PROFILING Enable ProcScript profiling in your application. $PROC_TRACING Activate ProcScript tracing in your application. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
